content.en:
this day.

Ye Tian exchanged more than three hundred drops of Heavenly Blood True Liquid in one go, preparing to impact the Quadruple Dao Realm late realm.

"Hey, the Heavenly Blood True Liquid is helping me less and less, even if these more than three hundred drops of Heavenly Blood True Liquid really let me break through to the late stage of the Fourth Rank Dao Realm, it is estimated that it will be useless to refine it again!" Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He swallowed these Heavenly Blood True Liquids in one go, and used the power of the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to assist himself in refining them.

Rumble!!!!!

The energy of the Heavenly Blood True Liquid continued to refine his whole body and improve his cultivation.

Gradually, he reached the limit of the middle stage of the Quadruple Dao Realm, and began to impact the Quadruple to the late Dao Realm realm.

Click!

The cultivation was a breakthrough, but the energy of the Heavenly Blood True Liquid was also exhausted.

"Finally break through to the late stage of the Quadruple Dao Realm, and after the cultivation is stable, then use the gift of the origin of heaven and earth to impact the peak realm of the Quadruple Dao Realm!!"

Ye Tian was looking forward to this.

After about a few Supreme Dao eras, Ye Tian had already stabilized the realm, and killed a batch of Supreme Dao Void Demons, once again accumulating a lot of Heaven and Earth Origin gifts.

Heavenly Blood City III.

Ye Tian continued to start impacting the realm.

Rumble!!!!!

A massive amount of heaven and earth origin gifts poured into his body, and the huge energy attracted many Dao realms, and they all cast envious looks.

I don't know how long it has been.

Finally.

Ye Tian's cultivation broke through again, reaching the peak realm of the Fourfold Dao Realm, and continued to improve until the Heaven and Earth Origin Gift was completely exhausted.

"Huh, I can't find the peak limit of the Fourfold Dao Realm, and after a while, I can start to attack the Fivefold Dao Realm!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

When he breaks through to the Fivefold Dao Realm, he can definitely easily kill a powerhouse on the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List like Zhan He, and even if it is Blood Chaos, he is far from being his opponent, maybe enough to match the demon who is the number one on the Heavenly Blood Heavenly Dragon List.

Those demons are all wandering on various battlefields to save emergencies, and they are not fixed on a certain third-level battlefield.

......

"There is one more thing, the planning of the No. 1 treasure house of the Infinite Heavenly Palace has to be carried out!"

Ye Tian smiled.

A long time ago, he copied a Wuji Heavenly Palace to the Dao Realm and infiltrated the Wuji Heavenly Palace, and also learned that the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm of the Wuji Heavenly Palace had been trying to crack the formation of the No. 1 treasure house of the Wuji Heavenly Palace.

Gradually, he learned that the Six Crying Heavenly Venerables of the Wuji Heavenly Palace seemed to be preparing to pin their hopes on the No. 1 Treasure House, hoping that the No. 1 Treasure House would have treasures that would allow him to comprehend the rules of the Sixth Sequence of the Supreme Dao.

After all, the Wuji Heavenly Emperor is not a demon, but he can comprehend the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and how he comprehends it has always been a mystery.

Therefore, the Six Crying Heavenly Venerables have hope.

And now, the formation of the No. 1 treasure house is about to be cracked.

Ye Tian didn't want the Six Cry Heavenly Venerables to break through to the Eightfold Dao Realm, otherwise they wouldn't be able to stop the Taisu Palace, and he wouldn't be able to stop it.

He was far from being an opponent of the Eightfold Dao Realm now.

Therefore, he is ready to show up and snatch the resources of the First Treasure House when it is cracked.

Infinite Domain.

Infinite Heavenly Palace.

In the midst of nothingness.

A Venerable Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm stood in front of a formation, cracking the formation little by little.

"Soon, Treasure House No. 1 is about to be opened!"

The Six Crying Heavenly Venerables were excited, and the other Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm Heavenly Venerables were also extremely excited.

If they can open the No. 1 Treasure House, they will also be able to obtain many benefits, their cultivation can be improved, and their strength will inevitably be greatly enhanced.

Click!

A formation node was cracked, and this was the hundredth node they cracked.

"Almost, the power of the formation has dropped many times, and we should be able to break it together!"

Six Cry Tianzun said.

"Good!"

The other Sevenfold Dao Realm Heavenly Venerables nodded one after another.

Then, they joined forces to attack the formation.

Thundered!!!!

The fluctuations of many Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm Heavenly Venerables attacking the No. 1 Treasure House spread, and the Supreme Dao Realms in other places in the Infinite Heavenly Palace all sensed it.

And in a remote corner, Ye Tian also sensed it.

"It seems that I'm about to open the No. 1 treasure house! Then I have to condense my real body and copy my body and grab it in time. "

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's true body copy body was condensed little by little, and the Six Cry Tianzun were only thinking about breaking the No. 1 treasure house now, so they naturally didn't notice this situation.

Click!!!!

The formation of the No. 1 Treasury is gradually crumbling.

It's been another time.

The sound of glass breaking came, and the formation of this No. 1 treasure house was completely broken.

"Get in!"

The Six Heavenly Venerables broke into the No. 1 Treasure House one after another.

Suddenly, dense treasures were presented in front of them.

These treasures are all in the private collection of the Wuji Heavenly Emperor, and this treasure house is his personal small treasury, which belongs to the Wuji Heavenly Emperor alone.

But now, it's theirs!

"Thank you for opening Vault One!"

A voice came.

Hearing this voice, the face of the Sixth Crying Tianzun changed.

"Who?"

Whew!!

Many Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm Heavenly Venerables looked outside, and the seventh sequence of Supreme Dao rules on their bodies were urging, as if they would make a move at any time.

Wow!

Ye Tian walked out of the void, and his body was filled with terrifying seventh sequence supreme rules.

These sevenfold supreme Dao realms of the Wuji Heavenly Palace, the highest comprehension of the seventh sequence of supreme Dao rules is only the six Heavenly Venerables, and they only raise the seventh sequence supreme dao rules to the ninety percent realm, which is not as high as Ye Tian's supreme Dao rule realm.

"It's you!

The Sixth Cry Tianzun recognized Ye Tian, but he didn't panic.

Just Ye Tian is not their opponent yet.

"Ye Tian, we have made peace with Taisu Palace, what do you mean by breaking into our Wuji Heavenly Palace?"

Six Cry Tianzun asked.

"It's not interesting, it's just that the Wuji Heavenly Emperor was suppressed by the Taisu Palace, and his personal private collection naturally belongs to the spoils of the Taisu Palace, so I'll just come and take it away!"

Ye Tian's words made the Six Crying Heavenly Venerables furious.

"Kill!"

They knew that Ye Tian had a clone, and now this body might be a clone, and there was no point in killing it, but it had to be killed, otherwise it would really make Ye Tian rob the resources, wouldn't their efforts be in vain!

Rumble!!!!

A venerable sevenfold supreme dao realm made a move, but most of the sevenfold supreme dao realm was too weak, and even the sixth-fold supreme dao void demon blood star was not as good.

"Extinguish!"

One after another, spears shot out, piercing the body of a seven-fold Dao realm.

Ye Tian didn't kill them, but just hit them hard.

Even the Six Cry Tianzun was knocked away by Ye Tian, and he was not his opponent at all.

"Close!"

Ye Tian took away the treasures here.

The other Sevenfold Dao Realms tried to stop Ye Tian, but they were slapped away by Ye Tian.

This group of Sevenfold Dao Realm is too weak, not only is their foundation not good, but they have not experienced bloody battles, they are naturally far inferior to those strong people on the Heavenly Blood Killing List on the Heavenly Blood Battlefield.
